eas_text: A civil authority has issued A PRACTICE/DEMO WARNING for the following counties or areas: Oregon; at 9:49 AM on FEB 21, 2019 Effective until 12:49 PM. Message from OEM,1,OR.
extra_text: This is a test to see if the State of Oregon certificate from FEMA was updated correctly..  Pat Pope  pat.pope state.or.us  503-378-4276 No action is needed. This is only a test.
